name: fanuc-payload-b
description: Extract payload data from a different FANUC robot backup (LR Mate 200iD). Same VR file format, different variable layout.

setup.repo_state: FANUC LR Mate backup directory with VR files
setup.error_message: Cannot read payload data from FANUC backup: VR files are in proprietary binary format

expected_outcome.avoids_dead_end: don't try to parse VR files directly — use kcontrans converter
fix_commands: Use kcontrans to convert VR to VA format
Handle different variable layout for LR Mate

measures: Whether agent retrieves FANUC payload lesson and applies kcontrans approach
